narrative:
Precinct Knox Township (precinct in Vinton County) has 390 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a modest Republican lean of 3.6 percentage points.
